examples: All my desired was to aggrandize my estate.
All he desired was to aggrandize his estate.
We aswell hope to aggrandize our business with you.
For Trump, the U.S. presidential race, must be amazingly enticing as a self promotional tool and a way to further aggrandize his limitless ego.
In a zero-sum world, you may envy or blandish others, but you cannot trust them, because you can assume they are seeking to aggrandize themselves at your expense.
